initiatives.name: Social Justice Center
initiatives.description: A community hub fostering mutual aid and social justice through collaborative organizing and resource sharing. They provide space and support for grassroots organizations while building networks of solidarity through community programs, educational events, and direct support initiatives in Madison.

initiatives.name: Madison Anarcha Collective
initiatives.description: Community coming together for intersectional liberation.

initiatives.name: Trans Advocacy Madison
initiatives.description: A grassroots advocacy collective for the Transgender, Non-Binary, Two-Spirit, & gender-expansive community in Teejop (Madison, WI)area

initiatives.name: Madison For Palestine
initiatives.description: Ind. & unaffiliated anti-imperialist collective based in Madison WI focused on Palestinian liberation

initiatives.name: Freedom Inc
initiatives.description: Freedom, Inc. engages low- to no-income communities of color in Dane County, WI. Our mission is to achieve social justice through coupling direct services with leadership development and community organizing.

initiatives.name: Trans Medical Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Aid for gender-affirming surgery patients. Rides to the hospital, meals for recovery, wound care supplies, surgery classes, peer support

initiatives.name: Madison-Rafah Sister City Project
initiatives.description: Unofficial sister city project to forge connections and increase public awareness of Palestine solidarity.

initiatives.name: Really Really Free Market Madison
initiatives.description: Come thru and take what you need & donate what you can.

initiatives.name: OutReach LGBTQ Center
initiatives.description: Welcome to the Official OutReach LGBTQ+ Community Center page. Building equity + providing community

initiatives.name: Madison IWW
initiatives.description: Madison, Wisconsin IWW (Industrial Workers of the World) General Membership Branch

initiatives.name: Madison Trans Resistance Action Committee
initiatives.description: TRAC is a grassroots org fighting for the rights of TGNC people in Madison via direct action! Join us - come to a monthly meeting or an action!

initiatives.name: Disability Pride Madison
initiatives.description: Disability Pride Madison's mission is to work as a cross-disability organization to support and celebrate disabled communities and promote disability justice in Madison, Wisconsin, and beyond.

initiatives.name: Madison Solidarity
initiatives.description: Doing mutual aid to support movements in and around Madison, WI

initiatives.name:

initiatives.description: Grassroots abortion justice right here in Wisconsin. Join us + stand together!

initiatives.name: Madison DSA
initiatives.description: The Madison, WI Chapter of the Democratic Socialists of America

initiatives.description: Weekly calendar of activist events in the greater Madison, WI bioregion
